prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fighting attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a tight knuckle flash with a bone-white center, terracotta-red pressure core, short angular strike edges, and a small contained dust pulse. Keep it compact, hard-edged, and battle-readable. Preserve real impact structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency. Important constraints: no beam, no travel trail, no fire shapes, no lightning filaments, no oversized symbol ring.
